rationale: The citing paper explicitly theorizes a shift from sequential search to a “choice mode” and says it links search models with choice-from-set phenomena, while the cited paper is a core two-stage choice study showing how screening changes information weighting and mechanism (active categorization). That conceptual overlap suggests the 2006 paper could be serving as a theory/mechanism foundation rather than a generic background mention. The DOI-exact reference match confirms this specific citation.
